description_long: This is a young adult woman with a casual urban appearance, standing with arms extended horizontally. She is dressed in a fitted short-sleeve t-shirt and high-waisted shorts, paired with low-top sneakers. Her hair is styled in a long, side-swept ponytail with a loose curl, and her facial features are softly defined. The figure has a natural, healthy build and is depicted in a relaxed, neutral pose. The clothing fits closely to the body, emphasizing a modern, everyday style suitable for city environments. No accessories or carried objects are visible.
description: A casually dressed young woman in a t-shirt, shorts, and sneakers, standing with arms outstretched. She has a long, side ponytail and a relaxed, neutral pose.
description_view_0: Front view showing the woman's facial features, t-shirt, shorts, and sneakers, with arms extended to the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of her face, the curve of her ponytail, and the side silhouette of her outfit.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of her head, ponytail, and the fit of her t-shirt and shorts from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, ponytail, and the side contour of her clothing and footwear.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve t-shirt and high-waisted shorts
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: long side ponytail with loose curl
